message:
feat(core): add pairing_heap.rs — simple mergeable priority queue (ft-283h4.41)

Pairing heap with O(1) insert/merge and amortized O(log n) delete-min.
Arena-allocated with two-pass pairing for child merging. Supports
insert, pop, peek, merge, sorted extraction. Ideal for priority
scheduling of pane capture tasks.
15 inline tests + 12 property-based tests against BinaryHeap reference.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
